*Hugo L. Hammer,Vajira Thambawita,Kristoffer Herland Hellton,Pål Halvorsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对可解释介观神经网络（IMNs）中权重坍塌导致解释不可靠的问题，提出局部保真正则化（LFR），通过对齐线性输出权重与局部数据变化来强制保证解释的可靠性，在保持高预测性能的同时显著提升模型可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始IMN框架缺乏保障机制，网络可将所有解释性方差集中到线性输出层的单个权重上，导致模型预测性能强但解释毫无意义；且L1惩罚反而加剧了这种退化配置。

Method: 提出局部保真正则化（LFR），通过惩罚项将线性输出权重与局部数据变化方向对齐，防止权重坍塌，确保解释的忠实性。

Result: 在OpenML基准测试中，LFR不仅没有牺牲准确率，反而在AUROC指标上优于未正则化的IMN，并且与最先进的黑盒模型性能高度竞争。

Conclusion: LFR实现了可靠可解释性与优越预测性能的双重收益，为可解释AI提供了有效且实用的正则化方案。

Abstract: Interpretable Mesomorphic Neural Networks (IMNs) offer a promising framework that combines the predictive power of deep neural networks with the interpretability of linear models. However, the original formulation lacks safeguards to ensure that the learned interpretations are in fact reliable. In particular, the network is free to concentrate all explanatory variance into a single weight of the linear output layer, achieving strong predictive performance while producing interpretations that are largely meaningless. Paradoxically, the L1 penalty proposed to encourage sparse solutions exacerbates this problem by further incentivizing such degenerate configurations.
  To address this vulnerability, we introduce Local Fidelity Regularization (LFR), a novel penalty term that prevents degenerate weight collapse by aligning the linear output weights with local data variations. This structural constraint guarantees faithful explanations and substantially improves the reliability of model interpretations. Furthermore, empirical evaluations across the OpenML benchmark suite demonstrate that LFR does not compromise accuracy for explainability; rather, it achieved improved AUROC over the unregularized IMN. By yielding results highly competitive with state-of-the-art black-box models, LFR provides the dual benefit of reliable interpretability and superior predictive performance. Source code and usage instructions are available at https://github.com/hugohammer/LFR-IMN.git.

</details>


### [513] [Exploiting Local Flatness for Efficient Out-of-Distribution Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29952)
*Seonghwan Park,Hyunji Jung,Dongyeop Lee,Namhoon Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Fold和AutoFold方法，通过利用Hessian曲率和部分特征归一化实现轻量级OOD检测，性能优于现有方法且计算效率高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于损失景观曲率的OOD检测方法计算成本高且依赖隐式假设，缺乏对ID和OOD数据曲率差异的系统研究。

Method: 提出Fold方法，利用特征Hessian矩阵和部分特征归一化来增强ID-OOD可分离性；并提出AutoFold自监督调优方案，通过ID logit掩码合成伪OOD样本实现自动校准。

Result: Fold在OOD基准测试中平均AUROC提升1.63%，FPR95降低2.30%，计算效率与标准前向传播相当。

Conclusion: Fold为鲁棒的OOD检测提供了有理论支撑且实用的解决方案，适用于实际部署场景。

Abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data is crucial for reliable machine learning deployment. Among detection strategies, post-hoc methods are particularly attractive due to their efficiency, as they operate directly on pre-trained networks without requiring retraining. Within this paradigm, one promising direction exploits loss-landscape curvature to estimate model uncertainty; however, such methods incur substantial computational cost and rely on implicit assumptions about how landscape flatness differs between in-distribution (ID) and OOD data. In this work, we provide the first systematic investigation of this curvature discrepancy and show that OOD inputs exhibit larger Hessian curvature than ID data, with the gap widening under stronger distributional shifts. Motivated by these observations, we propose Fold, a lightweight flatness-modulated OOD detector that leverages the feature Hessian and partial feature normalization to improve ID-OOD separability while avoiding costly parameter-space curvature approximations. To optimally adapt this normalization across diverse datasets, we further introduce AutoFold, a self-supervised tuning scheme that synthesizes pseudo-OOD samples via ID logit masking for automatic calibration without requiring external data. Experiments on OOD benchmarks show that Fold outperforms prior methods, improving the average AUROC by 1.63% and reducing FPR95 by 2.30%, while maintaining computational efficiency comparable to a standard forward pass. Supported by theoretical analysis and extensive ablations, Fold provides a principled and practical solution for robust real-world deployment.

</details>


### [514] [DuoMem: Towards Capable On-Device Memory Agents via Dual-Space Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29961)
*Peyman Hosseini,Ondrej Bohdal,Ahmed Alajrami,Andrea Maracani,Ignacio Castro,Matthew Purver,Mete Ozay,Savas Ozkan,Taha Ceritli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DuoMem是一种双空间蒸馏框架，将大型教师模型的过程求解能力迁移至紧凑学生模型，在ALFWorld任务上将4B模型成功率从4.3%提升至77.9%，接近72B教师模型的87.1%，且推理速度快3倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于LLM的智能体需要大模型、长上下文和多次推理调用才能完成复杂任务，这使得先进的内存增强型智能体难以部署在资源受限的设备上。

Method: 提出DuoMem双空间蒸馏框架：(1)上下文空间蒸馏——用教师生成的高质量过程记忆替换学生生成的记忆；(2)参数空间蒸馏——在成功的教师轨迹上微调轻量级LoRA适配器。

Result: 4B模型成功率达77.9%，接近72B教师的87.1%；仅增加不到1000万可训练参数和几MB预计算记忆；推理速度比72B教师快3倍以上。

Conclusion: 双空间蒸馏的两种互补贡献显著提升了小模型的过程求解能力，使其适用于实时边缘部署场景。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents can solve complex procedural tasks by interacting with environments over multiple turns, but this ability typically depends on large models, long contexts, and repeated inference calls. This makes advanced memory-augmented agents difficult to deploy on resource-constrained devices. We introduce DuoMem, a dual-space distillation framework that transfers procedural problem-solving ability from a large teacher model to compact student models. DuoMem distils in two complementary spaces: (1)context-space distillation, which replaces student-generated memories with higher-quality teacher-generated procedural memories prepended to the student's input, and (2)parameter-space distillation, which fine-tunes lightweight LoRA adapters on successful teacher trajectories. Evaluated on ALFWorld, a challenging embodied decision-making benchmark, DuoMem boosts a 4B-parameter model from 4.3% to 77.9% task success rate, closing most of the gap to a 72B teacher model (87.1%), while adding fewer than 10M trainable parameters and only a few megabytes of pre-computed teacher memories. Moreover, the DuoMem-enhanced 4B model completes tasks over 3x faster than the 72B teacher in wall-clock time, making it viable for real-time edge deployment, which would be challenging for the teacher.Extensive ablations across eight models spanning 2B-72B parameters reveal that both distillation axes contribute complementary

</details>


### [515] [NeuReasoner: Theory-grounded Mapping of Reasoning Elicitation Boundaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29971)
*Aydin Javadov,Shyngys Aitkazinov,Tobias Hoesli,Florian von Wangenheim,Bjoern Schuller,Joseph Ollier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NeuReasoner，一个基于理论的推理激发工具，通过神经透镜和认知透镜的配对结合内部模块化，在数学、编程及认知心理学任务上评估大语言模型的推理能力边界。研究发现，NeuReasoner在算术推理、代码生成等任务上可匹配甚至超越后训练思考模式，但在风险决策等任务上仍存在明显局限，且模型规模与激发策略存在复杂交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究指出大语言模型的推理能力主要潜藏于基座模型中，后训练主要起到放大而非引入作用，但这一结论主要基于数学和编程基准，缺乏对认知任务边界条件的系统探索。本文旨在通过理论驱动的激发工具，系统测绘推理激发在何种认知任务上成功、何处失败。

Method: 提出NeuReasoner这一模块化、可解释、基于理论的激发工具：每个步骤由Orchestrator配对神经透镜（受功能特异性启发）和认知透镜（源自Erotetic推理理论），通过单一模型的内部模块化整合输出，无需外部工具。在CogBench认知行为套件及标准数学/编程基准上评估，比较其与原始推理及后训练思考模式的表现。

Result: 在足够规模下，NeuReasoner在算术推理、代码生成、贝叶斯推理和奖励学习上匹配或超越思考模式基线，且优势在对比自一致性和迭代细化基线时依然保持。但风险决策和不确定性下的决策难以通过激发恢复。模型规模与激发策略存在双向交互：在某些认知特征上扩大优势，在另一些上则消除优势。

Conclusion: 通过NeuReasoner这一模块化、可解释、基于理论的激发工具，本文在数学和编程基准之外，实证地测绘了推理激发的成功与失败边界，为理解大语言模型推理能力的本质提供了更全面的认知图景。

Abstract: A growing body of work suggests that the reasoning capabilities of large language models are largely latent in their base form, with post-training primarily amplifying rather than introducing them. However, this evidence comes mainly from mathematical and coding benchmarks, leaving the boundary conditions of that claim largely unexplored, namely which cognitive tasks can be recovered through elicitation and where that recovery fails. To investigate this, we introduce NeuReasoner, a theory-grounded elicitation instrument. At each step, an orchestrator pairs a Neuro Lens, inspired by functional specificity, with a Cognitive Lens, drawn from the Erotetic Theory of Reasoning, and integrates their outputs through internal modularization of a single model, without external tools. We evaluate NeuReasoner on CogBench, a suite of behavioral tasks from cognitive psychology, alongside standard mathematical and coding benchmarks, measuring both its improvement over vanilla inference and its ability to match a model's post-trained thinking mode. At sufficient scale, NeuReasoner matches or exceeds thinking-mode baselines on arithmetic reasoning, code generation, Bayesian reasoning, and reward learning; these gains persist against self-consistency and iterative-refinement baselines matched to NeuReasoner's per-decision call budget. Using NeuReasoner allows us to find clear boundaries: risk-taking and decision making under uncertainty remains hard to recover through elicitation alone, and model scale interacts with elicitation in both directions: widening its advantage on some cognitive signatures while erasing it on others. Overall, through NeuReasoner as a modular, interpretable, theory-grounded elicitation instrument, we empirically map where reasoning elicitation succeeds and fails, beyond the mathematical and coding benchmarks where prior claims have rested.

</details>


### [516] [Atompack: A Storage and Distribution Layer for Read-Heavy Atomistic ML Training Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29975)
*Ali Ramlaoui,Daniel T. Speckhard,Sagar Pal,Fragkiskos D. Malliaros,Alexandre Duval,Victor Schmidt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Atompack，一种面向机器学习训练的分子数据集存储格式，通过追加写入和内存映射读取，相比HDF5、LMDB等传统格式，在乱序训练读取上快96倍，数据体积小79%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的原子级机器学习数据集存储格式（如HDF5、LMDB、ASE）主要面向交互式科学管理和数组存储，而非深度学习训练中频繁的随机读取需求，导致训练效率低下。

Method: Atompack采用追加写入（append-oriented）方式高效构建数据集，生成不可变索引后通过内存映射（memory-mapped）读取完整的分子记录，以匹配训练管线的随机读取模式。

Result: 在64原子的基准测试中，Atompack在乱序训练读取上比ASE LMDB快96倍，生成的数据集体积小79%。

Conclusion: 服务于完整分子记录而非字段分块或重构对象的存储格式，能显著提升乱序训练吞吐量，同时保持数据集足够紧凑以支持公共分发。

Abstract: Atomistic machine learning datasets are increasingly used for training: large immutable snapshots are read repeatedly, shuffled across epochs, staged across clusters' storage systems, and republished as reusable scientific artifacts. This workload differs from interactive scientific curation, where mutable records and ad hoc inspection are often more important than random indexed throughput. We present Atompack, an append-oriented storage format and distribution layer designed around a simple workload: training pipelines usually consume complete molecular records, while the order of records is randomized by the learning algorithm. Atompack appends records efficiently during dataset construction, then commits an immutable index and serves records through a memory-mapped read path optimized for training. We compare Atompack with HDF5, LMDB, and ASE baselines representing array stores, key-value records, serialized records, and object-oriented databases. The benchmarks measure sequential reads, shuffled reads, shared-filesystem behavior, write throughput, and artifact size. On a representative 64-atom workload, Atompack is 96x faster than ASE LMDB on shuffled training-style reads while producing artifacts about 79\% smaller. The results indicate that serving complete molecule records, rather than field chunks or reconstructed objects, improves shuffled training throughput while keeping artifacts compact enough for public distribution.

</details>


### [517] [Stabilizing Extrapolation in Looped Transformers via Learned Stochastic Stopping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29983)
*Hsun-Yu Kuo,El Mahdi Chayti,Patrik Reizinger,Wieland Brendel,Martin Jaggi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 循环Transformer在变长算法任务中表现出色，但存在OOD不稳定性。研究发现引入循环次数的随机性（特别是RL-Halting方法）能显著降低OOD方差，改善准确率-稳定性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环Transformer在处理变长算法任务时虽能展现长度泛化能力，但OOD方差大、行为不稳定，需要探究其根源并提出改进方法。

Method: 分析了序列长度与循环次数之间的虚假相关性导致的不稳定性；提出在训练中引入循环次数的随机性；进一步采用RL-Halting作为学习驱动的随机调度策略。

Result: 引入随机性显著降低了OOD方差；RL-Halting在多数任务（二元加法、Dyck-1、Unique Set、Copy）上改善了准确率-稳定性权衡，但在某些情况下可能稳定次优计算。

Conclusion: "何时停止"应作为训练阶段的设计选择，而非仅仅是推理阶段的计算分配规则。

Abstract: Looped Transformers, which repeatedly apply a shared transformer block, are an architecturally natural fit for variable-length algorithmic tasks. Although they can exhibit strong length generalization beyond the length of training sequences, this behavior is brittle, yielding high out-of-distribution (OOD) variance, even across well-performing in-distribution solutions. We trace this variance to the spurious correlation in simple algorithmic tasks between sequence length and number of loops. Introducing stochasticity into the number of loops during training sharply reduces OOD variance and stabilizes predictions across inference-time loop counts. To improve upon heuristic randomization schemes, we further analyze RL-Halting as a learned stochastic schedule and find that it generally improves the accuracy-stability trade-off. Across binary addition, Dyck-1, Unique Set, and Copy, learned stochastic stopping often improves this trade-off but can also stabilize a suboptimal computation. Our work suggests that "when to stop" should be treated as a training-time design choice, not merely an inference-time computation-allocation rule.

</details>


### [518] [T3R: Deeper Test-Time Adaptation for Graph Neural Networks via Gradient Rotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30011)
*Huy Truong,Alexander Lazovik,Victoria Degeler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出T3R方法，通过旋转矩阵和自监督信号实现图神经网络在测试时的深度适应，在回归和分类任务上均取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实系统中GNN通常权重固定，分布偏移下性能下降；传统微调需要大量标注数据，成本高昂或不可行；现有测试时训练方法仅能进行浅层更新，影响有限。

Method: 提出T3R框架，利用多个Rotograd矩阵增强目标任务与辅助任务之间的任务亲和性；通过旋转技术重新定向自监督信号，生成目标任务的替代梯度，实现几乎整个架构的深度适应。

Result: 在回归数据集上MAE降低0.172；在跨域OGB分类基准上相对提升至少9.37%。

Conclusion: T3R展示了在传统微调或重训练不可行的情况下，为图系统构建适应管道的潜力。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) deployed in real-world systems typically have fixed weights, often leading to degraded performance under distribution shifts. This issue can be mitigated by conventional fine-tuning, but in many real-world cases, collecting labeled data is expensive or infeasible. A potential approach is Test-Time Training (TTT), which adapts models' weights using unlabeled test data, yet it is typically limited to shallow updates that affect only a subset of model parameters. We propose T3R, leveraging multiple Rotograd matrices to improve task affinity between the target and auxiliary tasks, essential for effective test-time training. T3R further introduces a rotation technique that reorients self-supervised signals using these matrices to create surrogate gradients for the target task, allowing deeper adaptation across nearly the entire architecture. Empirically, T3R reduces MAE by 0.172 points over standard inference in regression datasets and achieves at least 9.37% relative improvement on cross-domain OGB classification benchmarks compared to models without adaptation. These results highlight the potential to develop an adaptation pipeline for graph-based systems, particularly in settings where conventional fine-tuning or retraining is infeasible.

</details>


### [519] [Heads, Not Backbones: Output Heads Dominate Architectures on Fat-Tailed Returns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30037)
*Sichao He,Yansong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在短周期肥尾金融收益预测中，输出头（output head）比骨干架构（backbone architecture）更重要。混合高斯密度头在危机时期（如1970年代滞胀）比单一高斯头提升13.9%的CRPS性能，而骨干架构间的差异小于1.5%。但在长周期（h≥6）骨干架构重新占主导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在短周期肥尾金融收益的深度预测流程中，骨干架构与输出头哪个对预测性能影响更大。

Method: 对比四种现代骨干架构（TimesNet、DLinear、N-BEATS、iTransformer）在三种输出头（点预测头、单高斯密度头、K=4的高斯混合密度头）下的表现。使用S&P 500月对数收益率（1871-2023）数据，采用锚定滚动前验证。

Result: 输出头形成严格梯度：点→高斯提升CRPS约1.3%，高斯→混合再提升约2.4%。骨干切换在点预测行和骨干均值轴上变化小于1.5%。模型置信集在5%水平上未排除任何变体。混合头在最高波动率区间（1970年代滞胀，h=12）提升达13.9%。

Conclusion: 在短周期肥尾收益预测中，输出头主导骨干架构；混合分布能在危机时期提供超越单一高斯分布的真实价值。但在长周期（h≥6）骨干架构重新占据主导地位。

Abstract: In a deep forecasting pipeline for fat-tailed financial returns at short horizons, which matters more - the backbone architecture or the output head? We compare four modern backbones (TimesNet, DLinear, N-BEATS, iTransformer) under three output heads: a point head, a single-Gaussian density head, and a Gaussian mixture density head with K=4 components. On S and P 500 monthly log-returns (1871-2023) under anchored walk-forward validation, the three heads form a strict gradient: switching from point to Gaussian improves CRPS by about 1.3 percent; switching from Gaussian to mixture adds a further about 2.4 percent. Switching between backbones, in contrast, changes CRPS by less than 1.5 percent on the point-head row and on the backbone-mean axis; density-head backbone spread is larger (up to 5.1 percent on the h=1 Gaussian row, driven by N-BEATS) but the head gradient (3.7 percentage points) still dominates. The Model Confidence Set on squared errors does not exclude any of the 12 variants at the 5 percent level: the head separates them only on distributional metrics (CRPS, pinball, coverage), not on squared error. The mixture head incremental value over a single Gaussian is largest in the highest-volatility regimes (13.9 percent in 1970s stagflation at h=12), confirming the mixture captures tail risk beyond what a unimodal Gaussian can express. The picture is horizon-dependent: the head dominates at short horizons, but at long horizons (h >= 6) the backbone re-takes the lead - an h-split we document against classical baselines (section 5.1). We conclude that on fat-tailed returns at short horizons, the head dominates the backbone, and the mixture distribution adds genuine value over a single Gaussian during crisis periods when risk-management decisions actually matter.

</details>


### [520] [Building Multi-Task Agentic LLMs via Two-Phase Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30044)
*Huaijie Wang,Shusheng Xu,Yi Wu,Kaifeng Lyu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种两阶段蒸馏方法：先通过离策略蒸馏（前向KL）合并多任务专家，再通过策略蒸馏进行精细化调整，从而解决多任务强化学习中单一模型性能退化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建能执行多个任务的人工智能模型，避免直接训练多任务模型带来的性能下降，探索通过蒸馏方式合并单任务专家模型的有效方法。

Method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段使用离策略蒸馏（前向KL）聚合多个单任务RL专家的数据，第二阶段使用策略蒸馏（模式寻求）进行精细化调整。

Result: 两阶段方法能够在多个任务（对话智能体和文本游戏）上匹配单任务RL专家的性能，而单独使用离策略或策略蒸馏均无法达到该性能。

Conclusion: 离策略蒸馏因前向KL的"模式覆盖"特性在多任务中导致性能退化，策略蒸馏虽为"模式寻求"但需要良好初始化，两阶段结合可有效克服各自缺点。

Abstract: A key step toward artificial general intelligence is to train models that can perform multiple tasks. In this paper, we study how to build such models by first training separate RL experts for individual tasks and then consolidating them via distillation, as an alternative to directly training a single model on mixed tasks. We show that off-policy distillation degrades in multi-task settings due to the mode-covering nature of forward KL: aggregating data from multiple tasks introduces a large number of behavioral modes that can exceed the student's capacity, forcing it to average across behaviors and leading to degraded performance. In contrast, on-policy distillation is mode-seeking but requires strong initialization. Inspired by these observations, we propose a two-phase approach: off-policy distillation followed by on-policy refinement. Evaluation across conversational agents and text-based games confirms that this two-phase approach matches single-task RL expert performance for each individual task, whereas off-policy or on-policy distillation alone fails to match this performance.

</details>


### [521] [From Failure Taxonomy to Intervention: A Diagnostic Methodology for Industry-Scale AVLM in Video and Live-Streaming Platform Moderation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30059)
*Shuchang Ye,Jinqiang Yu,Zhujun Xiao,Yajing Kong,Yist Y. Lin,Yang Ma,Jiaxi Liu,Xiaolei Xu,Zheng Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向工业级音视频语言模型（AVLM）开发的诊断方法论，将模型失败映射为可观测的失败特征分类体系，并链接到针对性的干预措施，已在大规模视频和直播平台落地应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态基础模型研究侧重架构、训练策略、数据缩放和基准结果，缺乏系统性的失败定位与针对性干预指导，导致模型改进沦为启发式试错，失败原因难以追溯。

Method: 构建失败特征分类体系（taxonomy of observable failure signatures），将每类失败映射到对应的干预空间（intervention space），并在AVLM的全生命周期开发和对齐中实例化该方法论。

Result: 系统支持超过100个区域，能够处理噪声、歧义和高度多样化的全球平台流量内容。

Conclusion: 提出了一个可操作的失败诊断与干预框架，弥补了现有研究在工业级模型开发中系统性指导的空白。

Abstract: Industry-scale video and live-streaming moderation imposes requirements that are difficult to satisfy with generic pretrained public models or external APIs, including adaptation to platform-specific data distributions, policy-specific objectives, and product-level safety constraints. As a result, platforms must undertake internal model development, naturally turning to shared public research for guidance. However, existing multimodal foundation-model studies primarily report architectures, training recipes, data scaling strategies, and benchmark results, but provide less systematic guidance on how failures should be localized and translated into targeted model-development interventions. Interventions are essential because deployment failures are rarely self-explanatory. Similar failures can originate from different causes. Without targeted interventions, improvement reduces to heuristic trial-and-error, where benchmark improvements are weakly attributable, and failures are difficult to trace to their underlying causes. To address this gap, we present a diagnostic methodology for industry-scale Audio-Visual-Language Models AVLM development. The methodology maps model failures into a taxonomy of observable failure signatures and links each class of failure to an intervention space. We instantiate this methodology across the development and alignment lifecycle of an AVLM foundation model for a large-scale video and live-streaming platform. The resulting system supports over 100 regions and is designed for noisy, ambiguous, and highly diverse content drawn from global platform traffic.

</details>


### [522] [Data-Driven Energy-Based Learning via Gibbs Measures on Hierarchical Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30064)
*L. U. Abdullaev,F. Herrera,U. A. Rozikov,M. V. Velasco*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于吉布斯测度的层次结构数据驱动概率学习框架，将经验损失函数转化为交互势能，定义了一个由数据生成的平衡学习状态族，并揭示了相变现象和多解共存机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统经验风险最小化仅从数据中选取单一最优参数，忽略了数据可能蕴含的多种可能的推理状态。作者希望构建一个概率化框架，将学习问题从单点估计拓展为对整个概率景观的刻画。

Method: 将经验损失函数转化为能量模型的交互势能，引入吉布斯分布描述数据驱动的平衡学习状态；建立有限体积分布的一致性条件，推导出刻画可容许学习状态的非线性积分不动点方程；针对平移不变解，利用数据依赖核诱导的正紧算子分析一维情形下的存在唯一性；在Cayley树上分析临界逆温度下的多吉布斯测度相变现象。

Result: 建立了经验损失景观与树上概率推理之间的严格联系；在一维情形下给出了解的存在唯一性条件；在Cayley树上发现多吉布斯测度在临界逆温度后涌现的现象；数值实验展示了不可分核的多解分支及多种数据诱导学习状态的共存。

Conclusion: 数据不仅通过最小化确定一个最优模型，而是定义了一个完整的概率推理状态景观，为能量基学习提供了新的视角。

Abstract: We introduce a data-driven probabilistic framework for learning systems based on Gibbs measures on hierarchical structures. Unlike standard empirical risk minimization, where a dataset is used to identify a single optimal parameter, our approach transforms the empirical loss function into an interaction potential defining an energy-based model. The resulting Gibbs distribution describes a family of equilibrium learning states generated by the data.
  We formulate the consistency conditions of the associated finite-volume distributions and derive nonlinear integral fixed-point equations whose solutions characterize the admissible learning states. These equations provide a rigorous connection between empirical loss landscapes and probabilistic inference on trees. For translation-invariant solutions, the problem reduces to the analysis of positive compact operators induced by data-dependent kernels, allowing us to establish existence and uniqueness conditions in the one-dimensional setting.
  Furthermore, we show that hierarchical learning systems may exhibit phase-transition phenomena: for certain empirical kernels on Cayley trees, multiple Gibbs measures emerge beyond a critical inverse temperature, corresponding to distinct equilibrium prediction regimes. Numerical experiments with non-separable kernels illustrate the appearance of multiple solution branches and demonstrate the coexistence of several data-induced learning states.
  Our results provide a new perspective on energy-based learning, where data do not merely determine an optimal model through minimization but define an entire probabilistic landscape of possible inference states.

</details>


### [523] [Neural Subspace Reallocation: Continual Learning as Retrieval-Based Subspace Memory Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30067)
*Byeong Hoon Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经子空间重分配(NSR)方法，将持续学习重构为参数子空间上的内存管理，通过压缩、存储、召回和重分配LoRA模块的四步循环机制，在固定容量下实现高效持续学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将LoRA模块视为一次性适配器，缺乏对历史知识的有效管理和重用机制，导致在循环环境（任务反复出现）中性能低下。

Method: 四步循环：(1) SVD压缩已学LoRA；(2) 存入TaskKnowledgeBank；(3) 通过嵌入相似性召回相关旧LoRA；(4) 重分配子空间，并用蒸馏保护旧任务。

Result: Split-CIFAR-100上循环恢复时间减少10倍；5-Datasets上准确率最高且遗忘最少，后向迁移比无记忆方法低约9倍；简单相似性检索即可匹配或超越强化学习控制器。

Conclusion: 核心发现：持续学习性能的关键驱动因素是内存机制（压缩+相似性检索），而非学习到的分配策略；压缩的知识库体积小（每任务0.29MB），支持Top-K容量约束。

Abstract: We introduce Neural Subspace Reallocation (NSR), which reframes continual learning as memory management over parameter subspaces. Instead of treating Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules as disposable per-task adapters, NSR manages them as compressible, retrievable memory units on a frozen backbone through a recurring cycle: (1) compress learned LoRAs via SVD, (2) reserve them in a TaskKnowledgeBank, (3) recall related past LoRAs by embedding similarity to warm-start new or returning tasks, and (4) reallocate the active subspace accordingly, with distillation protecting prior tasks. We prove that in cyclic environments any memoryless allocation policy incurs cumulative regret Omega(T(M-1)Delta_switch) relative to a history-aware policy backed by the Bank (Theorem 1). Empirically, on Split-CIFAR-100 the Bank reduces cyclic recovery time by 10x, exactly as predicted, and on the heterogeneous 5-Datasets benchmark NSR achieves the highest accuracy and the least forgetting, about 9x closer to zero backward transfer than the memoryless heuristics. Crucially, we run a controlled study that isolates which component matters: holding the Bank fixed and varying only the allocation rule, we find that a simple similarity-based retrieval rule matches or beats a learned reinforcement-learning controller (recovering recurring tasks in 0 vs 1.8 steps and reaching equal accuracy). Our central, honest finding is therefore that the memory mechanism -- compression and similarity retrieval -- rather than a learned allocation policy, drives continual-learning performance under fixed capacity. A memory-budget analysis confirms the compressed Bank stays small -- 0.29 MB of parameter memory per task -- so a top-K retention cap bounds the total footprint while preserving fast recovery for retained tasks.

</details>


### [524] [Predictive Objectives Discard Exogenous Control-Relevant Features: A Controlled Mechanistic Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30068)
*Ayan Pendharkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: JEPA-style预测目标会丢弃虽不可控但与控制相关的特征，而引入少量奖励信号即可有效恢复这些特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究JEPA类自监督学习方法在学习表征时，是否会丢弃那些智能体无法控制（外生）但对控制任务重要的特征，即使这些特征很容易编码。

Method: 采用2×2实验设计，独立操控特征的可控性和相关性，并通过"可预测性旋钮"解耦特征的时序可预测性与控制相关性。比较了六种目标函数：重建、JEPA、条件JEPA、基于可控性的JEPA、随机策略下的逆动力学、以及奖励驱动的JEPA。

Result: 所有无奖励的预测目标均将外生但控制相关的特征准确率降至接近随机水平；奖励驱动的JEPA能有选择性地保留该特征；仅需2%的奖励标注数据即可恢复该特征，该效果在两种环境、不同潜在维度（16-1024）下均成立。

Conclusion: JEPA类预测目标主要优化时序可预测性而非控制相关性，因此会丢失外生但重要的特征。引入少量奖励信号是标签高效且鲁棒的解决方案。JEPA潜在空间的几何结构与双模拟理论预测不一致，类分离能力远低于监督参考。

Abstract: Joint-embedding predictive (JEPA-style) objectives learn representations by predicting future latents. In doing so they can discard features that are exogenous (uncontrollable by the agent) yet control-relevant, even when those features are trivially encodable. This occurs because the objective optimizes temporal predictability rather than control-relevance. We isolate this failure mode in a controlled 2x2 experimental design that varies feature controllability and relevance independently, using a predictability knob that decouples a feature's temporal predictability from its control-relevance. Comparing six objectives: reconstruction, JEPA, action-conditioned JEPA, controllability-based JEPA, inverse dynamics under a random policy, and reward-grounded JEPA, we observe that all evaluated reward-free predictive objectives leave the exogenous control-relevant feature near chance accuracy, while a reward-grounded variant retains it selectively. The remedy is label-efficient and robust: as little as 2% of reward-labeled transitions recovers the feature, the effect holds across two environments with different surface forms, and it persists across latent dimensions from 16 to 1024. Comparing the learned latent geometry against bisimulation theory's prediction, the JEPA latent realizes only a small fraction of the class separation a supervised reference attains.

</details>


### [525] [Online Data Selection for Instruction Tuning via Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30077)
*Jun Wang,Quoc Phong Nguyen,Julien Monteil,Vu Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GAIA框架，利用高斯过程回归在语义空间建模连续效用流形，通过自适应策略融合机制动态优先选择高质量样本，解决了LLM训练中数据选择局限于批次内局部优化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM训练中的在线数据选择方法受限于"批次约束"，只能在随机批次内进行局部效用优化，缺乏全局视角，难以在语义空间中捕捉数据的连续效用分布。

Method: GAIA框架采用高斯过程回归在语义空间建模连续效用流形，设计自适应策略融合机制动态优先选择高效用样本，并将策略后验更新建模为固定共享Hedge框架的实例，从而获得动态遗憾保证。

Result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，GAIA显著优于包括GREATS在内的最先进基线方法，验证了其可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GAIA作为一种全局自适应数据选择框架，通过高斯过程回归和自适应策略融合，为高效指令微调提供了可扩展且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: With Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training and fine-tuning shifting its focus from data volume to data quality, quality data selection has emerged as a critical research topic. Existing online data selection methods for LLM training are typically "batch-constrained", limiting optimization to local utility within random batches. To overcome this, we propose GAIA (Global Adaptive Instruction tuning via GAussian processes), a framework that formulates data valuation as a global estimation process. GAIA employs Gaussian Process regression to model continuous utility manifolds across the semantic space, utilizing an adaptive strategy fusion mechanism to dynamically prioritize high-utility samples. By casting the strategy-posterior update as an instance of the classical fixed-share Hedge framework for tracking the best expert, we inherit a dynamic-regret guarantee that characterizes GAIA's robustness under non-stationary quality scores during training. Empirical evaluations on three datasets demonstrate that GAIA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like \greats, establishing our method as a scalable and robust solution for efficient instruction tuning.

</details>


### [526] [Query-Aware Spreading Activation for Multi-Hop Retrieval over Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30133)
*Illia Makarov,Mykola Glybovets*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于语义门的扩散激活方法，实现查询感知的图遍历，并可将完整检索流程表达为单条Cypher查询在Neo4j内完成，无需将图加载到Python内存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Graph RAG中图遍历是"查询盲"的，而QAFD-RAG虽实现查询感知但需将全图加载到Python内存并使用迭代求解器，与图数据库集成困难。

Method: 提出扩散激活方法，每一步使用语义门（候选实体描述与问题的余弦相似度）作为步权重，迭代次数固定。整个检索流程（种子映射、传播、Top-K选择、上下文组装）用单条Cypher查询在Neo4j内一次往返完成。

Result: 在MuSiQue上EM 32.80（QAFD-RAG为33.50），比最强结构基线HippoRAG高5.3 EM和3.4 F1；消融实验显示语义门带来3.6-7.4 F1提升，检索延迟降低1.5-4.9倍。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持查询感知能力的同时，显著简化了系统架构并提升效率，但短语-节点架构的基线在2WikiMultiHopQA上仍有优势。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation built on knowledge graphs (Graph RAG) outperforms flat passage retrieval on multi-hop question answering by leveraging graph structure. In most existing systems, however, the question only sets the seed nodes; the subsequent traversal becomes "query-blind", depending solely on the graph structure. The exception is QAFD-RAG, which implements query-aware traversal via a flow-diffusion solver with combined edge re-weighting. This architecture requires loading the full graph into Python memory and an iterative solver with a variable number of iterations complicating integration with the graph database. We propose a spreading-activation method that achieves the same query-aware traversal with a single per-step semantic gate: the step weight is the cosine similarity between the candidate entity's description and the question, and the number of iterations is fixed. The whole retrieval procedure - seed mapping, propagation, top-K selection and context assembly - is expressed as a single Cypher query executed in one round-trip to Neo4j; the graph never leaves the database. On MuSiQue our method matches QAFD-RAG by exact match (32.80 vs 33.50) and outperforms the strongest purely-structural baseline in our comparison, HippoRAG, by 5.3 EM and 3.4 F1; on 2WikiMultiHopQA HippoRAG and QAFD-RAG retain an advantage due to their phrase-node architectures. An ablation with the gate disabled confirms that the gate is the source of a simultaneous F1 gain of 3.6 to 7.4 points and a retrieval-latency reduction by a factor of 1.5 to 4.9.

</details>


### [527] [Robust Strategic Classification under Decision-Dependent Cost Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30136)
*Sura Alhanouti,Güzin Bayraksan,Parinaz Naghizadeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种考虑决策依赖成本的二阶段鲁棒优化框架，用于应对算法系统中的策略性博弈行为，展示了考虑策略成本依赖性不仅能减少不确定性，还能更有效地抑制长期博弈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有策略分类研究假设策略行为的成本是固定的且独立于分类器决策，但实际中操纵成本会随历史决策动态演变，现有方法无法捕捉这种依赖关系。

Method: 提出并分析了一个具有决策依赖不确定性集合的二阶段鲁棒优化框架，将当前决策对未来成本的影响纳入模型。

Result: 考虑策略依赖成本可以减少不确定性，并更好地抑制算法系统随时间推移被博弈的问题。

Conclusion: 对决策依赖成本的感知不仅有助于减少不确定性，还能更有效地遏制对算法系统的长期操纵行为。

Abstract: Humans facing algorithmic decision systems have been found to ``game'' them by altering their input data (at a cost to them) in order to favorably change the algorithmic outcomes they receive (at a cost to the algorithm). The growing literature on strategic classification seeks to develop robust machine learning algorithms that account for, and reduce, unwanted strategic behavior. A limitation of these existing works is that they assume the cost of strategic behavior to be fixed and independent of the classifier's decision. In practice, however, manipulation costs evolve and depend on past algorithmic decisions: today's decisions influence tomorrow's costs. This paper proposes and analyzes a two-stage robust optimization framework with a decision-dependent uncertainty set to capture such dependencies. We highlight that awareness of policy-dependent costs not only reduces uncertainty, but also better curtails gaming of the algorithmic system over time.

</details>


### [528] [Federated Learning with Energy-Based Structured Probabilistic Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30161)
*Dario Fenoglio,Daniil Kirilenko,Martin Gjoreski,Marc Langheinrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于条件随机场(CRF)的联邦学习客户端聚合权重优化框架，通过建模个体可靠性和客户端间交互提升非IID数据下的全局模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习通常使用固定或启发式权重规则进行客户端聚合，在客户端数据异构、贡献不均时效果欠佳。

Method: 利用CRF定义单点势能（个体可靠性）和成对势能（客户端间交互），通过CRF推理生成优化的聚合权重。

Result: 在非IID异构数据下，该方法一致地优于多个经典的联邦学习基线方法。

Conclusion: CRF建模客户端交互能有效改善联邦学习在异构场景下的聚合效率与收敛性能。

Abstract: Federated learning typically aggregates client updates using fixed or heuristic weighting rules, which can be suboptimal when clients have heterogeneous data and varying contributions to the global model. We propose a framework that refines client aggregation weights using Conditional Random Fields (CRFs). Our method defines unary potentials for individual clients and pairwise potentials for all client pairs, allowing the server to model both client-specific reliability and interactions between clients. The resulting CRF inference produces aggregation weights that enable better convergence of the global training objective. Experiments show that, under non-IID heterogeneity, our approach consistently improves performance over well-established federated learning baselines.

</details>


### [529] [Beyond Drug Discovery: The Nanotechnology Molecular Optimization (NMO) Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30170)
*Matthias Blaschke,Daniel Kienzle,Zsuzsanna Koczor-Benda,Julian Lorenz,Rainer Lienhart,Fabian Pauly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了纳米技术分子优化（NMO）基准，用量子模拟替代代理指标，为机器学习驱动真正的纳米科学发现提供了严格的测试平台和新方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子生成模型依赖简化的药物性质代理指标和制药数据集预训练，导致基准指标好但难以迁移到与药物发现结构不同的领域（如纳米技术），限制了ML驱动真实科学发现的能力。

Method: (1) 提出NMO基准，用量子模拟替代代理oracle，实施严格协议优先考虑科学效用而非排行榜过拟合；(2) 开发新基线方法，包括用于建模结构约束的新颖表示和消除制药数据集偏见的领域无关预训练策略。

Result: 先进分子优化方法在NMO任务上表现不如更简单的方法；新基线方法超越了现有物理性质最优结果，发现了此前未知的结构基序。

Conclusion: ML可以驱动真正的科学发现，而不仅限于优化基准指标；为纳米技术社区提供了新见解，并强调了领域无关预训练和物理约束表示的重要性。

Abstract: Generative molecular design is shaped by simple proxy benchmarks for drug-like properties and models pretrained on large pharmaceutical datasets. This combination yields strong benchmark metrics but limits transferability to domains structurally distinct from drug discovery. To overcome this limitation and drive discovery toward real, scientifically grounded targets, we introduce the Nanotechnology Molecular Optimization (NMO) Benchmark, which bridges machine learning (ML) and quantum materials science. NMO acts simultaneously as a rigorous testbed for the ML community and a discovery engine for nanotechnology research. The suite replaces proxy oracles with quantum simulations and introduces strict protocols that prioritize scientific utility over leaderboard-oriented overfitting. The physics-based NMO tasks impose hard structural constraints and rugged fitness landscapes, posing fundamentally new requirements on generative models. Notably, advanced molecular optimization methods underperform much simpler approaches on the NMO tasks. We develop a new baseline method identifying the critical components to solve the NMO tasks, including a novel representation for modeling structural constraints and a domain-agnostic pretraining strategy to eliminate pharmaceutical dataset bias. Our results surpass state-of-the-art physical properties and reveal previously unknown structural motifs, offering new insights for the nanotechnology community and demonstrating that ML can drive genuine scientific discovery.

</details>


### [530] [Characterizing Optimizer-Dependent Training Dynamics Through Hessian Eigenvector Displacement and Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30226)
*Marcelina Marjankowska,Valerio Modugno,Paolo Barucca*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究神经网络训练中Hessian矩阵主导特征向量的演化动态，发现SGD优化器使曲率方向逐渐稳定，而Adam则导致特征向量持续重组并呈现局部化现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注Hessian特征值（曲率大小）与泛化、优化动力学的关系，但对特征向量（曲率方向）在训练过程中的演化规律及其对学习轨迹的影响缺乏深入理解。

Method: 在多分类感知器上跟踪训练动态，使用两种互补统计量分析特征向量演化：(i) 位移量（借鉴玻璃态系统分析），(ii) 逆参与比（衡量局部化程度），并与架构诱导的随机零模型进行对比。

Result: SGD下主导曲率方向逐渐稳定；Adam下特征向量持续显著重组，且表现出局部化现象——少量参数对主导曲率方向贡献不成比例地大。

Conclusion: Hessian特征向量动态能够捕捉优化器行为的关键差异及其导致的训练轨迹差异。

Abstract: Hessian spectral properties are a standard tool in analysing neural-network training, with eigenvalues linked to sharpness, generalization, and optimization dynamics. Eigenvalues quantify curvature magnitude, while eigenvectors identify which parameters generate that curvature. In this work, we study how the leading Hessian eigenvectors evolve during training and how they affect the learning trajectories. We track the training dynamics of multilayer perceptrons on a classification problem and measure eigenvector dynamics through two complementary statistics: (i) displacement over time, inspired by analyses of glassy systems, and (ii) localization via the inverse participation ratio. The metrics are compared against a random null model of the Hessian induced by the architecture. Our results reveal clear optimizer-dependent behaviour. SGD leads to progressively more stable leading curvature directions, while Adam exhibits substantially stronger reorganization of eigenvectors throughout training. We also observe a localization phenomenon under Adam, where a small subset of parameters contributes disproportionately to the leading curvature directions. These results suggest that Hessian eigenvector dynamics capture key differences in optimizer behaviour and the resulting training trajectories.

</details>


### [531] [B3O: Scalable Boltzmann Batch Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30228)
*Maximilian Bloor,Liyuan Xu,Hrvoje Stojic,Victor Picheny*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: B3O通过直接从采集函数的玻尔兹曼分布中采样来生成批次查询，避免了传统批量贝叶斯优化的计算瓶颈，并在理论上证明了该方法仅带来可忽略的额外遗憾，实验上在标准和复杂任务中均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大批量贝叶斯优化方法计算成本高或依赖近似方法导致批次多样性降低，亟需一种可扩展的高效批量生成方法。

Method: 提出B3O框架，将批次生成重构为纯采样问题——直接从采集函数定义的玻尔兹曼分布中采样查询点，避免现有方法的计算瓶颈。

Result: 理论上证明玻尔兹曼分布采样的查询仅带来可忽略的额外遗憾；实验上在标准合成基准、多目标电极设计及混合变量赛车配置等任务中均优于现有批量BO方法。

Conclusion: B3O是一种高效、可扩展的大批量贝叶斯优化方法，兼具理论保证和实际鲁棒性，适用于现代工程仿真工作流。

Abstract: Modern engineering workflows increasingly rely on massive parallel simulation, driving the need for scalable, large-batch Bayesian Optimization (BO). Existing batch BO methods, however, incur large computational cost or rely on approximations that erode batch diversity. We propose B3O (Boltzmann Batch Bayesian Optimization), a framework that reframes batch generation as a pure sampling problem: drawing samples directly from the Boltzmann distribution defined by the acquisition function avoids the bottlenecks of existing large-batch methods. Theoretically, we prove that queries sampled from this distribution incur only negligible additional regret. Empirically, B3O outperforms existing batch BO methods on standard synthetic benchmarks and adapts robustly across complex applied tasks, including multi-objective electrode design and mixed-variable race car configuration.

</details>


### [532] [Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion for Unsupervised Community Detection on Heterophilic Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30249)
*Feifan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion (CGSD)，一种全无监督的异嗜图社区检测方法，利用离散Forman-Ricci曲率作为拓扑信号，通过曲率门控的sheaf扩散编码器和曲率感知谱聚类器，在五个异嗜图基准上取得竞争性结果，其中Wisconsin和Chameleon数据集上表现最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异嗜图中相连节点常属于不同类别，传统无监督社区检测方法（模块度、谱方法）忽视节点特征，而深度图聚类方法依赖对比学习或生成模型，缺乏可解释性。因此需要一种既利用图拓扑结构又可解释的无监督社区检测方法。

Method: CGSD包含三个核心贡献：(i) 曲率门控sheaf扩散编码器，通过σ(κ_e)门控边消息传递，训练时使用三种无标签结构损失（模块度、抗坍缩、曲率加权重建）；(ii) 曲率感知谱聚类器CSpec，在Ng-Jordan-Weiss谱聚类前用σ(ακ_{e*})重新加权k-NN亲和矩阵；(iii) 统一无标签评估框架，与九个无监督基线比较。

Result: 在Cora、Cornell、Texas、Wisconsin、Chameleon五个异嗜图基准上，CGSD在Wisconsin和Chameleon上全面领先，在其他三个数据集上与基线持平或具有竞争力。聚类器CSpec在相同嵌入上比K-Means平均NMI提升15%（0.091→0.107，p=0.008）。社区内外的曲率分布有明显分离。

Conclusion: CGSD利用曲率这一简单拓扑信号，在无监督异嗜图社区检测中达到了有竞争力的性能，且具有良好的可解释性。曲率感知聚类器是性能提升的关键驱动因素。

Abstract: Detecting communities in heterophilic graphs -- where connected nodes often belong to different classes -- is hard for unsupervised methods: classical modularity and spectral methods are feature agnostic, while deep graph-clustering methods rely on contrastive or generative machinery that is opaque. We propose Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion (CGSD), a fully unsupervised community-detection algorithm that uses the discrete Forman--Ricci curvature of each edge as its single topological signal, propagated through every stage of an end-to-end pipeline. CGSD makes three concrete contributions: (i)~a curvature-gated sheaf-diffusion encoder that gates edge messages by $σ(κ_e)$ and is trained from three label-free structural losses (modularity, anti-collapse, curvature-weighted reconstruction); (ii)~a curvature-aware spectral clusterer (CSpec) that re-weights the $k$-NN affinity of the embedding by $σ(ακ_{e^*})$ before Ng--Jordan--Weiss; and (iii)~a unified label-free evaluation against nine truly-unsupervised baselines. On five heterophilic benchmarks (Cora, Cornell, Texas, Wisconsin, Chameleon), CGSD wins outright on Wisconsin and Chameleon and is competitive on the remaining three against nine unsupervised baselines. The gain over the strongest baseline is driven by the clusterer, not the encoder: on the same embedding, CSpec improves mean NMI from $0.091$ with $K$-Means to $0.107$ ($+15\%$, paired $t$-test $p=0.008$). The mechanism is interpretable: intra-community and inter-community curvature distributions are visibly separated. Code is open-sourced at https://github.com/woodywff/cgsd.

</details>


### [533] [KnowsTFM: Knowledge-Informed Fine-Tuning of Small Tabular Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30258)
*Boshko Koloski,Xiangjian Jiang,Senja Pollak,Blaž Škrlj,Mateja Jamnik,Nikola Simidjievski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出知识引导的小型表格基础模型微调方法（KnowSTF），通过知识图谱结构注意力先验和参数高效低秩更新两种机制，在专业领域取得显著提升，但在通用领域效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数据稀缺、高维且分布偏移的专业领域，现有表格基础模型可能无法超越精心设计的领域专用方法，而这些领域通常拥有知识图谱等结构化知识，但如何利用这些知识改进小型专业表格基础模型尚不明确。

Method: 基于小型表格基础模型（TabPFN和TabICL变体），采用两种互补机制：1）从知识图谱推导的结构注意力先验；2）参数高效的低秩更新（LoRA），在受控合成先验族下进行微调。

Result: 注入领域结构化知识在专业场景中较原始变体有显著提升，但在通用任务上增益有限。此外，持续微调前沿模型可能导致预训练知识和机制的崩溃。

Conclusion: 知识引导的微调能有效提升小型表格基础模型在专业领域的表现，但需要警惕持续微调对预训练知识的灾难性遗忘问题。

Abstract: Tabular foundation models have advanced deep learning for tabular data by delivering strong default performance across many small and medium tasks. Yet in niche domains, where data is scarce, high-dimensional, and shifted from the pretraining distribution, they may still fail to outperform carefully designed domain-specific methods. Many such domains also provide curated relational knowledge in the form of knowledge graphs and knowledge banks, but how to use this knowledge to improve and steer \textit{small} specialist tabular foundation models remains unclear. We address this problem through \textbf{Know}ledge-informed fine-tuning of \textbf{s}mall \textbf{T}abular \textbf{F}oundation \textbf{M}odels (\modelname). Specifically, we study nanoscale TabPFN- and TabICL-style variants, pretrained under controlled synthetic prior families and adapted using two complementary mechanisms: structural attention priors derived from knowledge graphs and parameter-efficient low-rank updates. We show that injecting domain-specific structural knowledge during fine-tuning yields meaningful gains over vanilla variants in specialist settings, whereas gains on general-domain tasks are marginal. We further observe that continual fine-tuning of frontier models can trigger collapse of pretrained knowledge and mechanisms.

</details>


### [534] [When Is a Draft Accepted? A Theory of Acceptance in Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30265)
*Aaryam Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对推测解码（Speculative Decoding）中贪心解码、松弛接受准则和树形候选集等实际场景，建立了确定性局部接受事件的理论框架，并推导出KL散度、边界等方面的精确认证条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论主要研究随机、分布保持的推测解码设置（目标是精确采样），而实际系统常使用贪心解码、松弛接受规则或树形候选集，这些场景的成功取决于局部排序和阈值事件而非精确分布等价，缺乏理论支持。

Method: 将常见接受准则的拒绝区域刻画为目标分布的低水平集；推导严格贪心解码、加性和乘性松弛接受、top-m松弛准则、熵阈值接受等情况的KL散度认证和边界；扩展至贪心树形解码，推导认证条件；在Qwen3模型上评估。

Result: 松弛和树形准则显著扩大了认证接受区域，特别是在目标模型分布边界较小的解码步骤上。

Conclusion: 本文补充了现有分布保持分析，为实际推理系统中常见的确定性局部接受事件提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates language model inference by using a fast drafter to propose candidate tokens that are then verified by a larger target model. Existing theory largely studies the stochastic, distribution-preserving setting, where the goal is to exactly sample from the target distribution. In contrast, many practical systems use greedy decoding, relaxed acceptance rules, or tree-based candidate sets, where success is governed by local ranking and threshold events rather than exact distributional equality. We develop a theory for these regimes. We identify that many common acceptance criteria have rejection regions that can be characterized as lower level sets of the target distribution. For these, we characterize the exact KL divergence required for rejection yielding exact certificates and sharp margin-based bounds for strict greedy decoding, additive and multiplicative relaxed acceptance, top-(m) relaxed criteria, and entropy-thresholded acceptance. We then extend the framework to greedy tree decoding, deriving exact and margin-only certificates for when the target greedy token remains covered by the drafter's top-(m) candidates. Finally, we evaluate the resulting certificates on Qwen3 models, showing that relaxed and tree-based criteria substantially enlarge the region of certified acceptance, especially on decoding steps with low target model distribution margin. These results complement existing distribution-preserving analyses of speculative decoding by characterizing the deterministic local acceptance events common in practical inference systems.

</details>


### [535] [Towards Continual Motion-Language Agents: LoRA Variants for Incremental Motion Understanding and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30266)
*Bertram Taetz,Hugo Albuquerque Cosme da Silva,Gabriele Bleser-Taetz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了双向运动-语言智能体在连续学习场景下的稳定性-可塑性权衡，提出了基于混合专家架构的LoRA方法，在无需任务标签的情况下实现近乎零遗忘，并建立了可复现的五任务基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基础模型在静态场景下表现良好，但自主智能体在动态环境中需要持续学习新的运动概念（如新运动风格或手势），同时避免灾难性遗忘已有技能。双向运动-语言学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡尚未被充分研究。

Method: 基于冻结的大语言模型骨干，引入LoRA变体减轻任务间干扰；提出混合专家架构，利用自编码器路由器在推理时选择任务特定专家，无需任务标签；从HumanML3D通过语义聚类构建五任务基准。

Result: 在M2T和T2M两个方向上均实现近乎零遗忘，同时保持高质量的生成和描述能力；硬专家选择（路由）显著优于软专家混合；发现token级准确率与下游生成质量之间存在不一致性。

Conclusion: 专家隔离对连续学习性能至关重要，当前评估指标（如token准确率）可能不足以反映生成质量，未来需要更全面的评估协议来研究终身运动-语言智能体。

Abstract: Motion-language agents must possess the bidirectional capability to both understand human movement (motion-to-text, M2T) and generate it from natural language (text-to-motion, T2M). While foundational models have achieved strong performance in static settings, autonomous agents operating in dynamic environments must continuously incorporate new motion concepts -- such as novel athletic styles or specialized gestures -- without catastrophic forgetting of previously acquired skills. We investigate the stability-plasticity trade-off in bidirectional motion-language learning under sequential task exposure. Building on a frozen large language model backbone, we introduce low-rank adaptation (LoRA) variants designed to mitigate inter-task interference. We specifically propose mixture-of-experts architectures that utilize an autoencoder-based router to select task-specific experts at inference time, so that no task-label is needed. To evaluate these methods, we establish a reproducible five-task benchmark derived from HumanML3D through semantic clustering of motion descriptions. Our experimental results demonstrate near-zero forgetting across both M2T and T2M directions while maintaining high generation and captioning quality. Furthermore, we show that hard expert selection via routing significantly outperforms soft expert blending in quality metrics, indicating that preserving expert isolation is critical for maintaining performance in our continual learning setting. Finally, we observe that a divergence between token-level accuracy and downstream generation quality may occur, highlighting the need for more comprehensive evaluation protocols in future research on lifelong motion-language agents.

</details>


### [536] [DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview: A Low-Compute Real-Time Controllable World Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30292)
*Daniyel Ayupov,Artur Markov-Tsoy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview 是一个基于开源视频模型适配的、可在消费级GPU上实时运行的交互式世界模拟系统，支持键盘鼠标控制、多模态初始化、双视角操作等，在RTX 4090上可达14-15 FPS。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索一条低计算成本、可在消费级GPU上运行的实时交互世界模拟器技术路线，作为前沿大规模世界模型的补充。

Method: 基于Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B视频模型，采用LongLive自回归视频堆栈，并引入受Matrix-Game启发的残差动作通路进行适配。

Result: 支持实时键盘鼠标控制、多模态初始化、中途重提示、双视角操作，在单张RTX 4090上以480p分辨率达到14-15 FPS，内存占用低。

Conclusion: 虽未达到前沿质量或记忆完备，但展示了在消费级GPU上构建实时可控世界模型预览的实用低计算路线。

Abstract: We present DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview, a preview foundational world model for real-time interactive world simulation. The system adapts the LongLive 1 autoregressive video stack, itself derived from Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, with a residual action pathway inspired by the Matrix-Game family. DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview focuses on a complementary axis to frontier-scale world simulators: low-compute adaptation, consumer-GPU runtime, and broad interactive capability coverage. It supports live keyboard and mouse control, multimodal initialization, mid-stream reprompting, dual-view operation, and minute-scale interactive rollouts at native 480p resolution, reaching up to 14 to 15 FPS FPS on a single RTX 4090 with a low memory footprint. By leveraging open video backbones and applying targeted adaptation runs, we build the preview system with high cost-efficiency. DF-World 0.1 Preview is not yet a memory-complete or frontier-quality world simulator, but demonstrates a practical low-compute route toward real-time controllable world-model previews on consumer GPUs.

</details>


### [537] [Toward an Energy-Optimized Operation of Data Centers Located in Wind Farms Using Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30316)
*Jan Stenner,Alexander Kilian,Sebastian Peitz,Hermann de Meer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了强化学习在风电集成HPC数据中心中作为在线控制器进行负载迁移的应用，发现纯RL存在信用分配问题，并通过模仿学习和奖励塑形进行了改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索强化学习作为在线控制器在风电集成HPC数据中心中实现负载迁移的可行性，解决纯RL在利用免费风能方面的不足。

Method: 构建了可复现的固定日模拟框架，包含合成风电、价格信号和延迟完成反馈；在单风机单数据中心场景下，对比了纯RL、模仿学习和奖励塑形三种方法，使用PPO和SAC变体进行训练。

Result: PPO和SAC变体在学到的策略中表现优异；模仿学习和奖励塑形在相关配置下均有改进；但与离线全知优化器相比仍存在性能差距。

Conclusion: 该基准测试和消融实验为向多站点和连续时间场景扩展提供了透明基础，强化学习在在线决策方面具有实用价值但尚需进一步优化。

Abstract: This paper studies Reinforcement Learning as an online controller for curtailment-aware workload shifting in wind-turbine-integrated high-performance computing (HPC) data centers. We introduce a reproducible fixed-day simulation framework with synthetic wind and price signals and delayed completion feedback, designed to be extensible toward more complex scenarios. As a controlled benchmarking basis, we then focus on the minimal case with one wind turbine and one co-located data center. In this setting, pure Reinforcement Learning exhibits a pronounced credit-assignment problem and tends to underuse free wind energy early in the day. We therefore evaluate two complementary countermeasures: optimization-based Imitation Learning and potential-based Reward Shaping. Across multi-seed training and a 200-day test set, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) variant with an additional on-policy update routine achieve strong empirical performance among learned policies, and both Imitation Learning and Reward Shaping provide improvements in relevant configurations. A performance gap to the optimizer remains, which is expected: the optimizer plans offline with full-day foresight, whereas Reinforcement Learning must decide online from current observations without future realizations. The benchmark and ablation results provide a transparent basis for extending the approach toward richer multi-site and continuous-time scenarios.

</details>


### [538] [Hybrid Active-Online Learning Framework for Label-Efficient Concept Drift Adaptation in Optical Network Failure Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30322)
*Yousuf Moiz Ali,Jaroslaw E. Prilepsky,João Pedro,Sasipim Srivallapanondh,Antonio Napoli,Sergei K. Turitsyn,Pedro Freire*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种混合主动-在线学习框架，通过仅查询3.4%的流样本实现接近最优的光纤网络故障检测精度，有效适应概念漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降低光纤网络故障检测中标签成本，同时适应数据流中的概念漂移现象。

Method: 采用基于边际的选择性标注策略的混合主动-在线学习框架。

Result: 仅查询3.4%的流样本即可达到接近上限的准确率和AUC分数，延迟开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: 该方法在标签效率和检测性能之间取得了良好平衡，适用于光纤网络故障检测场景。

Abstract: We propose a hybrid active-online learning framework for label-efficient concept drift adaptation in optical network failure detection. Using margin-based selective labeling, our method achieves nearceiling accuracy and AUC scores while querying only 3.4% of streaming samples, with negligible latency overhead compared to static inference.

</details>


### [539] [FlexTab: A Flexible Encoder-Decoder Architecture for In-Context Learning Across Diverse Tabular Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30336)
*Marek Polewczyk,Maximilian Schambach,Marco Spinaci,Sam Thelin,Johannes Höhne*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlexTab是一种灵活的编码器-解码器架构，通过任务无关的编码器和任务特定的解码器，在表格数据的上下文学习中实现了多种下游任务（分类、回归、异常检测、聚类、实体匹配等）的最优或竞争性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格上下文学习方法将特征表示与特定预测目标绑定，缺乏灵活性。作者希望设计一种目标无关的行嵌入，能够支持多种下游任务。

Method: 提出FlexTab架构，包含一个任务无关的编码器和多个任务特定的解码器。编码器和解码器在大规模真实未标注表格数据上联合训练，实现表格原生的上下文学习。

Result: 在分类、回归、异常检测和实体匹配任务上达到最先进水平，在关系数据库的实体分类上与专用模型竞争力相当。

Conclusion: 单个共享编码器配合任务特定解码器可以作为通用表格预测任务的骨干网络，证明了目标无关表示学习的有效性。

Abstract: We introduce FlexTab, a flexible encoder-decoder architecture for in-context learning on tabular data that pairs a single, task-agnostic encoder with a suite of task-specific decoders. Unlike existing tabular in-context learners, which entangle feature representations with a specific prediction target, our design produces \textit{target-agnostic} row embeddings that can be leveraged across a wide range of downstream tasks within a table-native in-context learning setup. We demonstrate this flexibility on six distinct problems: classification, regression, anomaly detection, clustering, entity matching, and entity classification in relational databases. Both the encoder and the task-specific decoders are trained on a large corpus of real-world, unlabeled tables. FlexTab achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification, regression, anomaly detection and entity matching, while remaining competitive with specialized models on entity classification in a relational setting. These results demonstrate that a single shared encoder, paired with task-specific decoders, can serve as an effective general-purpose backbone for diverse tabular prediction problems. The inference code and checkpoints will be made publicly available at https://github.com/SAP-samples/flextab.

</details>


### [540] [DRIFT: Difficulty Routing Self-DIstillation with Rhythm-Gated Exploration and Success BuFfer Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30345)
*Haisen Luo,Yiwei Liu,Haoning Wang,Dan Liu,Junxi Yin,Haotian Wang,Lei Zhang,Xiaoyu Tian,Shuaiting Chen,Yuansheng Song,Baoyan Guo,Xiongfei Yan,Bolan Yang,Chengwei Liu,Ming Cui,Jiong Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DRIFT是一个面向大语言模型的在线自演进策略优化框架，通过难度路由（Difficulty Routing）和节奏门控（Rhythm Gating）联合机制，在问题级别和令牌级别动态调控自蒸馏与强化学习信号，在五个基准和三种模型规模上超越了GRPO和SDPO，平均准确率达79.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自蒸馏和强化学习方法缺乏追踪问题级别学习进度并相应调整优化策略的显式机制，导致对简单问题过优化、对困难问题监督弱、对边界案例探索不足。作者旨在实现无需外部专家监督的稳定自改进。

Method: DRIFT框架包含两个核心机制：（1）Difficulty Routing（难度路由）——在问题级别识别模型学习状态，动态分配自蒸馏和强化学习信号；（2）Rhythm Gating（节奏门控）——在令牌级别细化策略更新，集中探索关键推理位置。此外引入成功缓冲区（success buffer）和两阶段课程学习策略，保留高质量历史经验并逐步引导模型从可靠行为获取走向稳定策略演化。

Result: 在五个基准和三种模型规模上，DRIFT在所有评估指标上超越GRPO和SDPO的峰值性能。五个基准平均得分79.5%，超过GRPO 9.5%、SDPO 7.5%。在ToolUse任务上准确率达79.2%，超过GRPO 13.5%、SDPO 10.7%，均达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: DRIFT通过联合使用Difficulty Routing和Rhythm Gating，有效解决了现有方法在问题级别学习进度追踪和优化策略自适应方面的不足，实现了更稳定、更高效的大语言模型自改进，在多个基准上取得了显著提升。

Abstract: Enabling large language models to achieve stable self-improvement without external expert supervision remains a central challenge in complex reasoning tasks. Existing self-distillation and reinforcement learning methods lack explicit mechanisms for tracking problem-level learning progress and adapting optimization strategies accordingly. Consequently, training may over-optimize easy problems, receive weak supervision from hard problems, and fail to sufficiently explore borderline cases. To resolve these issues, we propose DRIFT, an online self-evolution policy optimization framework for large language models. DRIFT regulates the model's self-improvement process through the joint use of Difficulty Routing and Rhythm Gating. The former identifies the model's learning state at the problem level and dynamically allocates self-distillation and reinforcement learning signals, while the latter refines policy updates at the token level, concentrating exploration on critical reasoning positions. By further incorporating a success buffer and a two-stage curriculum learning strategy, DRIFT preserves high-quality historical experience while progressively guiding the model from reliable behavior acquisition toward stable policy evolution. Evaluated across five benchmarks and three model scales, DRIFT surpasses the peak performance of both GRPO and SDPO across all evaluated metrics. On the average score over the five benchmarks, DRIFT achieves 79.5$\%$, outperforming GRPO by 9.5$\%$ and SDPO by 7.5$\%$, establishing a new state-of-the-art result. Notably, on ToolUse, DRIFT reaches an accuracy of 79.2$\%$, improving over GRPO by 13.5$\%$ and SDPO by 10.7$\%$, setting a new state-of-the-art and substantially outperforming all concurrent methods.

</details>


### [541] [On the Vulnerability of Parameter-Level Defenses to Model Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30360)
*Kuangpu Guo,Qingyan Zheng,Jian Liang,Yongcan Yu,Zilei Wang,Ran He,Tieniu Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现现有参数级防御使受保护任务向量幅度过小，导致模型以预训练权重为主导，据此提出基于锚点引导的攻击（AGA）和基于锚点排斥的防御（ARF）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无训练模型合并存在安全漏洞，恶意用户可未经授权组合专家模型，而现有参数级防御存在被绕过的风险。

Method: 提出Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA)，利用预训练模型作为静态锚点，通过对齐受保护模型与锚点来解析恢复变换矩阵；以及Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF)作为防御方法。

Result: AGA在防御不可知场景下持续绕过个体和复合防御；ARF有效抵御AGA攻击。

Conclusion: 现有防御因受保护任务向量幅度过小而存在根本性缺陷，锚点引导攻击可有效突破，但锚点排斥微调可提供有效防护。

Abstract: The training-free integration of expert models via model merging has exposed significant security risks, enabling free-riders to combine specialized models without authorization. Recent works propose parameter-level defenses that employ linear parameter transformations to neutralize this threat. In this paper, we systematically analyze such defenses and reveal that their protected task vectors are inherently small in magnitude. Consequently, the protected weights remain overwhelmingly dominated by the pretrained model. Based on this observation, we designate the pretrained model as a static reference anchor and propose the Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA) to circumvent existing safeguards. Specifically, AGA aligns the protected model with this anchor to recover the transformation matrix analytically. Extensive evaluations validate that AGA consistently bypasses both individual and composite defenses under realistic defense-agnostic scenarios. Furthermore, we provide Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF), a defense method to mitigate the anchor dominance leveraged by AGA. Empirical results confirm that ARF effectively defeats the proposed attack. Our code is available at https://github.com/krumpguo/secure-merge-attack.

</details>


### [542] [FlowAWR: Online Adaptive Flow Reinforcement via Advantage-Weighted Rectification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30376)
*Zheming Fu,Ruizhe He,Wei Shang,Xiaoxiao Ma,Lei Wang,Chang Liu,Siming Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FlowAWR，一种通过优势加权回归最优速度场来实现连续生成流模型对齐的方法，无需SDE采样和CFG，在SD3.5-Medium上实现了2-5倍收敛加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续空间生成流模型的对齐方法存在两个问题：(1) 基于密度近似的策略梯度方法依赖随机SDE采样器，导致训练-推理不一致并需要CFG；(2) 隐式框架如DiffusionNFT使用启发式固定幅度修正，无法根据组内相对质量动态调整优化强度。

Method: 从KL约束奖励最大化的最优策略出发，推导出最优速度场具有优势加权修正形式，将连续生成策略优化转化为对最优速度场的监督回归。

Result: 在SD3.5-Medium上，FlowAWR在1.2k步达到24.12 PickScore，而DiffusionNFT在2.0k步为23.82，FlowGRPO需4k+步达23.50；多奖励约束下保持生成质量与域外性能。

Conclusion: FlowAWR提供了一种SDE-free、CFG-free的连续生成流对齐范式，显著提升了对齐性能与收敛速度。

Abstract: Aligning generative flow models on continuous spaces via online reinforcement learning is constrained by intractable trajectory likelihoods. Existing density-approximated policy gradient methods rely on stochastic SDE samplers to construct tractable transition kernels, which introduce training-inference inconsistencies and necessitates Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG).
  While implicit frameworks such as DiffusionNFT directly optimize forward-process velocity fields, its heuristic fixed-magnitude corrections prevent optimization strength from relative intra-group quality.
  We propose \textit{Flow Advantage-Weighted Rectification} (\textbf{FlowAWR}), a paradigm that recasts continuous generative policy optimization as supervised regression toward a theoretically optimal velocity field.
  Starting from the optimal policy of a KL-constrained reward maximization, FlowAWR derives the optimal velocity field that admits a magnitude-aware, advantage-weighted rectification form, yielding SDE-free optimization and CFG-free generation.
  In comparative evaluations on SD3.5-Medium, FlowAWR achieves improved alignment performance alongside a 2$\times$ to 5$\times$ convergence acceleration over DiffusionNFT (e.g., reaching a 24.12 PickScore in 1.2k steps, versus 23.82 in 2.0k steps for DiffusionNFT and 23.50 in $>$4k steps for FlowGRPO). Under multi-reward constraints, FlowAWR sustains generation quality, satisfying structural rules while maintaining stable out-of-domain performance.

</details>


### [543] [Scalar Representations of Neural Network Training Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30384)
*Pedro Jiménez-González,Miguel C. Soriano,Lucas Lacasa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将神经网络训练轨迹视为时序网络，通过标量嵌入方法将其降维至一维，发现该嵌入能保留原始高维空间的主要动力学特征（如对初始条件的敏感性、最大李雅普诺夫指数重建），并定义了特征时间去量化轨迹去相关时间，同时发现渐近训练态的空间分布服从偏态对数正态分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络训练中参数数量庞大，直接分析高维损失景观中的动力学轨迹具有挑战性，需要一种有效的低维表示方法来简化分析。

Method: 将训练轨迹建模为时序网络，应用时序网络的标量嵌入策略进行降维；在MLP MNIST分类任务上验证；通过嵌入轨迹定义特征时间（类似李雅普诺夫时间）；分析渐近态间距分布。

Result: 标量嵌入保留了原始高维空间的主要动力学特征（如对学习率敏感、最大李雅普诺夫指数重建）；定义的Lyapunov-like时间能捕捉轨迹去相关时间；渐近态间距分布服从偏态对数正态分布，且在不同初始条件下具有普适性。

Conclusion: 标量低维嵌入为研究和可视化神经网络优化轨迹的动力学特性提供了有用的框架。

Abstract: Training in artificial neural networks can be viewed as a trajectory evolving through a high-dimensional loss landscape. However, the large number of trainable parameters makes the direct analysis of these dynamics challenging. In this work, we treat such training trajectories as temporal networks and apply recently proposed strategies for the scalar embedding of temporal networks. We investigate whether such a scalar embedding provides a meaningful low-dimensional representation of neural network training dynamics. Using a multilayer perceptron trained on the MNIST classification task, we show that the embedding preserves the main dynamical features observed in the original parameter space, including the emergence of sensitivity to initial conditions for specific learning rate regimes and an accurate reconstruction of the network's maximum Lyapunov exponent. We then use the embedded scalar trajectory to define a characteristic time, analogous to a Lyapunov time, after which the exponential separation between initially close embedded trajectories saturates. This characteristic time captures the typical decorrelation time between initially close network trajectories in the original high-dimensional system. Finally, we investigate the statistical organization of asymptotic training states through a spacing observable defined in the embedded space. We find that the distributions of rescaled asymptotic spacings collapse onto a common form across initial conditions and are compatible with a skew lognormal distribution. Altogether, our results suggest that scalar low-dimensional embeddings provide a useful framework for studying and visualizing the dynamical properties of neural network optimization trajectories.

</details>


### [544] [Predict, Reuse, and Repair: Accelerating Dynamic Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30389)
*Tianyu Wang,Gourav Rattihalli,Aditya Dhakal,Junbo Li,Zhiwei Ren,Dejan Milojicic,Longfei Shangguan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRR是一种推测-重用-修复运行时系统，通过利用动态稀疏注意力选择的时间局部性来预测KV块、并行推测注意力计算，并在选择完成后增量修复遗漏的块，从而将长上下文LLM解码延迟降低40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态稀疏注意力（DSA）虽然能加速长上下文LLM解码，但其选择到注意力的串行依赖关系成为新的延迟瓶颈。

Method: 提出了PRR框架，包含：1）轻量级EMA预测器预测可能的KV块；2）基于profiling指导的推测预算，使推测工作脱离关键路径；3）基于FlashAttention的修复核，利用在线softmax统计将遗漏块合并到部分注意力状态中。

Result: 在长上下文基准测试和代表性DSA方法上，PRR将每token解码延迟降低高达40%，同时保持下游任务精度不变。

Conclusion: PRR有效消除了DSA的选择-注意力串行瓶颈，为长上下文LLM的高效解码提供了实用的运行时优化方案。

Abstract: Dynamic sparse attention (DSA) accelerates long-context LLM decoding by attending to only the top-K KV blocks relevant to each query, but it introduces a serialized selection-to-attention dependency that emerges as a new latency bottleneck. We present PRR, a speculate-reuse-repair runtime that exploits temporal locality in DSA selections to predict likely blocks, speculate the attention over them while selection is in flight, and incrementally repair missed blocks once the true selected set is known. PRR uses a lightweight EMA-based predictor, a profiling-guided speculation budget that keeps speculative work off the critical path, and a FlashAttention-based repair kernel that folds missed blocks into the partial attention state using online-softmax statistics. Across long-context benchmarks and representative DSA methods, PRR reduces per-token decoding latency by up to 40% while preserving downstream task accuracy. Github: https://github.com/Tianyu9748/Incremental_FlashAttention

</details>


### [545] [Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30410)
*Lennart Purucker,Andrej Tschalzev,Nick Erickson,Gioia Blayer,David Holzmüller,Alan Arazi,Alexander Pfefferle,Mustafa Tajjar,Gaël Varoquaux,Frank Hutter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了BeyondArena，首个统一的表格数据基准测试框架，涵盖多种任务类型、样本规模和特征维度。通过11个模型和142个数据集的评估发现，现有表格基础模型在小型到中型的IID数据上表现优异，而传统树模型和深度学习模型在非IID、大规模和高维数据集上仍占主导地位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格基础模型的评估碎片化，标准基准排除了最具挑战性的场景，导致模型研究局限在IID数据上的边际改进，无法推动真正的进步。

Method: 构建BeyondArena统一基准，涵盖IID、时序、分组等任务类型，不同样本规模和特征维度，包含文本和高基数特征。同时开发Data Foundry框架用于表格数据集的策展和元数据管理。

Result: 在11个模型和142个数据集上，现有表格基础模型在中小型IID数据上表现优异，但传统树模型和深度学习模型在非IID、大规模和高维数据集上仍占主导。

Conclusion: BeyondArena能够引导模型研究聚焦于表格数据中最具挑战性的问题，推动真正基础性表格模型的发展。

Abstract: Foundation models for predictive machine learning on tabular data have recently gained significant traction in academia and industry. Research communities across disciplines are increasingly evaluating tabular foundation models on diverse datasets and tasks. However, these task- and discipline-specific evaluations remain largely inaccessible to model researchers because benchmark software and evaluation protocols are fragmented. As a result, model researchers rely on standard benchmarks, which are mostly defined for tasks where tabular foundation models already excel. The most challenging scenarios are excluded, limiting meaningful progress in the field by focusing on marginal improvements on IID data rather than on broader, more demanding challenges. To overcome this, we introduce BeyondArena, the first unified holistic benchmark for tabular data that supports diverse task types (IID, temporal, grouped), across sample size and feature dimensionality scales, with diverse feature types (with text, with high cardinality) from a broad range of disciplines. To enable unified benchmarking beyond standard benchmarks, we introduce Data Foundry, a Python framework and metadata schema for curating tabular datasets for predictive machine learning. Our results across 11 models and 142 curated datasets show that existing tabular foundation models excel on tiny- to medium-sized IID data, while traditional tree-based and deep learning models still dominate on non-IID, large, and high-dimensional datasets. BeyondArena guides model research for the most demanding challenges in tabular data, enabling progress towards truly foundational tabular models.

</details>


### [546] [Diffusion Fine-tuning with Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30414)
*Alexis Jacq,Guillaume Couairon,Valentin De Bortoli,Quentin Berthet,Arnaud Doucet,Romuald Elie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation (RMMD)，一种同时蒸馏扩散模型并最大化奖励函数的新框架，在ImageNet上实现FID-奖励帕累托最优，并在天气预测模型GenCast上实现7.5倍加速且超越教师模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蒸馏和强化学习微调是扩散模型后训练的两大支柱，但两者之间的相互作用尚未被充分理解，尤其是微调如何影响蒸馏模型的生成质量。

Method: 提出RMMD框架，通过调整采样循环进行在线训练，并将蒸馏损失重新用作积分KL正则化的代理，从而同时实现模型蒸馏和奖励函数最大化。

Result: 在ImageNet上，RMMD相比DI++、DRaFT、HyperNoise等方法实现了更优的FID-奖励帕累托前沿；在GenCast上，蒸馏模型获得7.5倍加速，在93%的目标天气变量上超越教师模型且校准性更好。

Conclusion: RMMD证明了同时进行蒸馏和奖励优化的可行性，并能够扩展到复杂的高维科学领域。

Abstract: Distillation and Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning are the primary pillars of diffusion post-training. While traditionally studied in isolation, the interaction between these phases remains poorly understood, and in particular how fine-tuning impacts the generative quality of distilled models. We introduce Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation (RMMD), a novel framework that simultaneously distills diffusion models and maximizes a reward function. RMMD preserves the high-fidelity ``naturalness'' characteristic of advanced distillation (such as 8-step Moment Matching) by adapting the sampling loop for on-policy training and repurposing the distillation loss as a proxy for integral KL regularization. By evaluating the FID-Reward Pareto fronts on ImageNet, we demonstrate that RMMD achieves superior trade-offs compared to single-step baselines (DI++) and multi-step competitors (DRaFT, HyperNoise). Finally, we apply RMMD to GenCast, a state-of-the-art weather forecasting model, to distill it while optimizing the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) metric. The resulting distilled model achieves a 7.5x speedup while outperforming the teacher model on 93% of target weather variables, and being better calibrated. This proves that RMMD scales to complex, high-dimensional scientific domains.

</details>


### [547] [Experience Augmented Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30420)
*Jinda Lu,Kexin Huang,Junkang Wu,Shuo Yang,Jinghan Li,Chiyu Ma,Shaohang Wei,Xiang Wang,Guoyin Wang,Jingren Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EAPO方法，通过将经验表示为策略自适应的动作级先验，并选择性注入关键决策点，配合改进的重要性采样，在多个基准上提升了RLVR的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖从头开始的同策略优化，采样成本高且经验利用效率低；直接复用固定推理轨迹会导致策略不匹配问题。

Method: 提出Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO)：1）将先前RL优化策略作为动作级经验先验；2）在rollout的关键决策点选择性注入经验；3）采用自适应重要性采样确保稳定无偏学习。

Result: 在Qwen-2.5-math 7B和Qwen-3-8B模型上，五个不同基准测试中一致优于现有最先进RLVR方法。

Conclusion: 经验应以策略自适应的方式重用，而非固定推理轨迹；EAPO方法有效提升了RLVR的样本效率和推理性能。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is a powerful paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, existing RLVR methods typically rely on on-policy optimization from scratch, resulting in high sampling costs and inefficient utilization of accumulated experience. As model capabilities and policy behaviors evolve during training, recent attempts to reuse experience via fixed reasoning trajectories further suffer from policy mismatch. Motivated by these limitations, we argue that experience in RLVR should not be reused as fixed reasoning trajectories, but instead expressed in a policy-adaptive manner. In this work, we propose Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO), which leverages a prior RL-optimized policy as an action-level experience prior and selectively injects experience at critical decision points during rollout. To ensure stable and unbiased learning from experience-augmented rollouts, EAPO further incorporates an adapted importance sampling scheme. Experiments on using Qwen-2.5-math 7b and Qwen-3-8B on five different benchmarks demonstrate that EAPO consistently improves reasoning performance over state-of-the-art RLVR methods.

</details>


### [548] [Proofs of Ownership for Machine Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30423)
*Ran Canetti,Shafi Goldwasser,Or Zamir*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化定义了机器学习模型的“所有权证明”问题，并证明了在黑盒设定下，模型所有权可证明当且仅当该概念类不可自纠正（基于密码学假设）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器学习的广泛应用，保护模型所有权成为一个关键挑战，但缺乏对“所有权证明”的形式化研究。

Method: 将所有权证明建模为三方博弈（所有者、窃取者、法官），并在黑盒设定下利用密码学假设与自纠正概念（Blum-Luby-Rubinfeld）进行理论分析。

Result: 在标准密码学假设下，模型所有权可证明当且仅当概念类不可自纠正，该二分法结论具有构造性。

Conclusion: 该结果为ML模型所有权保护提供了理论基础，并扩展到了多种相关场景。

Abstract: With the increasing adoption of Machine Learning, protecting model ownership has become an essential challenge. We initiate a formal study of Proof of Ownership for machine learning models: under what conditions can one prove that a stolen model originated from a particular creator? We model proofs of ownership as a game among three parties: a model owner, a thief, and a judge. The owner transforms the original model into a slightly perturbed model together with a proof of ownership. The thief then obtains the transformed model and attempts to minimally modify it so that it remains useful but escapes detection as owned by the model owner. Finally, the judge receives a model and a proof of ownership, and must decide whether the given model is a modified version of some model created by the model owner, or else the given model was developed independently.
  Our main result is a dichotomy for classifiers in the black-box setting: Under standard cryptographic assumptions, ownership of models for some concept class can be proven in the above sense {\em if and only if} the concept class is not self-correctable, in a sense close to that of Blum, Luby and Rubinfeld, STOC'90. The result is constructive and extends, with some variations, to a number of related settings.

</details>


### [549] [Arko-T: A Foundation Model for Text-to-Structured 3D Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30429)
*Liang Wang,Zhaoyang Xi,Zekai Xiang,Heng Meng,Qishan Zhang,Pingyi Zhou,Jin Liu,Litao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Arko-T是一个40亿参数的文字到设计模型，能将自然语言直接转化为可执行、可编辑的参数化CAD程序，在12项指标中的8项取得最优成绩，成本仅为前沿模型的十分之一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到3D系统只能生成用于渲染的形状，而非可编辑的设计。作者希望弥合自然语言与可编辑参数化CAD设计之间的鸿沟，使生成的CAD工件具有可编辑性。

Method: 构建40亿参数的文本到设计模型Arko-T，通过数据整理、代码归一化和执行监督校准等策略，使流水线的每个阶段都对齐到形式化的"设计状态"概念，从而保留CAD工件的特征、参数和构造逻辑。

Result: 在12项指标中与7个前沿LLM对比，Arko-T在8项指标上取得最佳成绩，另有3项排第二，且每个基准测试的成本仅为前沿模型的十分之一。

Conclusion: 针对性的中等规模设计级训练可以匹配前沿通用模型在结构化CAD生成上的表现，证明了设计导向训练的有效性和经济性。

Abstract: Text-to-3D systems can now synthesize a mechanical part from a single sentence, yet the result is a shape to render, not a design to edit. We present Arko-T, a 4B-parameter text-to-design model that maps natural-language intent directly into executable, parametric CAD programs. Rather than optimizing for code executability alone, Arko-T aligns every stage of the pipeline to a formal notion of design state, so that data curation, code normalization, and execution-grounded supervision all work to preserve the features, parameters, and construction logic that make a CAD artifact editable. Benchmarked against seven frontier LLMs across 12 metrics, Arko-T attains the best score on 8 and the second-best on 3 more, at roughly one-tenth the per-benchmark cost. The results suggest that targeted design-level training at moderate scale can match frontier general-purpose models on structured CAD generation.

</details>


### [550] [Transformer Architectures as Complete Bayes Processes: A Formal Proof in the Measure-Theoretic Kernel Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30440)
*Haobo Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化证明了当Transformer的内部更新机制满足贝叶斯联合分布条件时，其前向计算严格等价于贝叶斯后验推断，并从核函数框架到多层堆叠架构建立了完整的证明层级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在从理论上严格证明Transformer架构与贝叶斯后验推断之间的形式等价关系，弥补现有研究中关于Transformer可解释性与概率推断之间缺乏严格形式化证明的空白。

Method: 在测度论核函数框架下，定义了从核心贝叶斯Transformer到语义Transformer、完整Transformer块（含QKV/注意力/残差/MLP流水线）再到多层堆叠的抽象层级，并在每一层证明贝叶斯联合语义蕴含更新核几乎处处等于后验。通过Radon-Nikodym微分推导块级显式贝叶斯公式并证明其归一化，同时证明softmax注意力机制在键上诱导出合法概率分布。
